audit: PHASE 32 DAY 7 ADD-ON — Position 1–15 Click Failure Audit

gsc_data.note: Latest available GSC data. Query+page dimension, rowLimit=500.

executive_summary.core_finding: The 'position 1-15 with 0 clicks' problem is MOSTLY A MIRAGE. Of 92 pages ranking position 1–15, 78 have 1–3 impressions over 28 days — statistical noise from obscure long-tail queries. Only ~8 pages have real volume (>20 imp/28d) at these positions, and the click failure has clear, fixable root causes.
executive_summary.key_insight: The only bracket with meaningful volume is pos 6-10 (436 imp). The ONLY click in the entire pos 1-15 range came from /tools/investment-25k-10yr at pos 11.2. The zero-click problem is concentrated in 3 root causes: (1) snippet gives answer away, (2) noindexed tool variants ranking against intent, (3) statistical noise from low-volume queries.

top_candidates_audited.primary_query: if you borrow $20,000 for 5 years at an annual rate of 8%, what would the monthly payment be
top_candidates_audited.current_title: $20,000 Loan at 8% for 5 Years — See YOUR Monthly Payment & Full Schedule | QFINHUB
top_candidates_audited.current_meta: Borrowing $20,000 at 8% for 5 years? See your personalized monthly payment in seconds — adjust the amount, rate, or term to match YOUR exact loan. Free calculator with full amortization schedule, no sign-up.
top_candidates_audited.snippet_problem_detail: The user's query is a MATH PROBLEM. Google likely scrapes the monthly payment answer ($368.11/month) from the page content and displays it directly in the search snippet or a featured answer box. User gets the answer without clicking. This is the #1 canonical example of SNIPPET PROBLEM.
top_candidates_audited.query_intent: INFORMATIONAL — user wants to know the monthly payment, not explore calculator options
top_candidates_audited.serp_intent_match: MISMATCHED — page is optimized for 'explore different loan scenarios' but query is a direct math question
top_candidates_audited.ctr_rescue_recommendation: Move the exact answer ($368.11/month) OFF the H1/first paragraph. Replace H1 with a curiosity hook: 'What's YOUR $20,000 Loan Really Costing You? — See the Truth' or 'Borrowing $20,000? Here's Why Your Monthly Payment Isn't What You Think.' Put the calculator ABOVE the fold so users must interact to get their number. The key: do NOT give Google the answer to scrape. Make the user click to discover.
top_candidates_audited.should_improve_hold_noindex_remove: IMPROVE — deploy after Jun 25 Day 7 decision if AdSense review allows. This page has 344 impressions at good positions. Fixing the snippet could unlock the second click on the entire site.
top_candidates_audited.deploy_blocked_by: AdSense review stability (Phase 34) — this is a blog page, not review-critical, but any deploy carries risk during review

top_candidates_audited.primary_query: UNKNOWN — page-level data only (query+page dimension has too many low-volume queries)
top_candidates_audited.current_title: $100,000 at 5% for 20 Years Compound Growth Example | QFINHUB
top_candidates_audited.current_meta: Compound interest example for $100,000 grow at 5% APY over 20 years with $1,000 monthly contributions? Example growth projection for a fixed scenario. For your exact numbers, use the full Compound Interest Calculator.
top_candidates_audited.indexable: UNKNOWN — likely noindexed by template but Google may still rank
top_candidates_audited.page_type: TOOL_VARIANT — static formula page, not interactive calculator
top_candidates_audited.snippet_problem_detail: Title IS the answer: '$100,000 at 5% for 20 Years' tells the user exactly what this is. The H1 likely shows the final amount too. No reason to click.
top_candidates_audited.query_intent: MIXED — some users want the answer, others want a calculator
top_candidates_audited.serp_intent_match: MISMATCHED — this is a static example page ranking for queries where users want an interactive calculator
top_candidates_audited.ctr_rescue_recommendation: This page should be NOINDEXED. It's a formula variant — a static page showing ONE specific example. Users searching for 'compound interest 100k 5%' want either: (a) the answer (which Google can show in a snippet) or (b) an interactive calculator to change the numbers. This page gives the answer in the title AND isn't interactive. It cannibalizes the real /calculators/compound-interest page. Remove from sitemap. Noindex via template.
top_candidates_audited.should_improve_hold_noindex_remove: NOINDEX — this is a thin-content formula variant. It should never have been in the sitemap. The 81 impressions it gets should go to the real calculator page.
top_candidates_audited.deploy_blocked_by: Phase 31 freeze — no pruning allowed. Add to cleanup list for post-freeze execution.

NOINDEX_TOOL_VARIANT.recommendation: Noindex all. These steal impressions from real calculator pages. Remove from sitemap. Can be done in bulk post-Phase 31 freeze. Combined, they waste 246 impressions that should go to real calculators.
NOINDEX_TOOL_VARIANT.blocked_by: Phase 31 freeze — no pruning. AdSense review stability.
NOINDEX_TOOL_VARIANT.earliest_execution: After Phase 31 freeze lift AND AdSense approval

SNIPPET_PROBLEM.recommendation: Fix H1 and above-fold content to hide the exact answer. Replace with curiosity hook. Move calculator above fold. This is the #1 priority — 344 impressions at pos 7-12 is the best opportunity on the site for a second click.
SNIPPET_PROBLEM.blocked_by: AdSense review stability (blog page — not review-critical but any deploy carries risk)
SNIPPET_PROBLEM.earliest_execution: Jun 25 after Day 7 decision, if AdSense allows

WRONG_PAGE_RANKING.recommendation: Noindex immediately. Admin page ranking in SERP has zero value.

LOW_VOLUME_ONLY.description: Pages with 1-3 impressions at position 1-15. These are statistical noise — Google tested the page against an obscure query 1-2 times. No diagnosis possible at this volume. Do not optimize for these queries.

REAL_FIRST_CLICK_CANDIDATE.description: Real pages at decent positions but too-low volume to matter yet. Will improve naturally when tool variants stop cannibalizing their queries.

root_cause_analysis.the_real_problem: QFINHUB's zero-click problem is NOT a CTR optimization issue — it's a CONTENT ARCHITECTURE problem. The site has dozens of auto-generated tool variant pages (compound-100k-20yr-5pct, mortgage-200k-15yr-5-5pct, etc.) that rank for specific-number queries. These pages: (a) give the answer away in the title/snippet, (b) are NOT interactive calculators that users want, and (c) cannibalize traffic that should go to real calculator pages (mortgage-calculator, compound-interest). Every impression a tool variant gets is a wasted opportunity.
why_users_dont_click: Tool variants give the answer in the title/H1 — Google scrapes it, user gets answer without clicking
Tool variants are static pages — users searching for 'mortgage 200k 15yr 5.5%' want an interactive calculator, not a static example
The 20k loan blog's primary query is a math problem — Google likely shows the answer ($368/month) directly in the snippet
/all-pages ranks for something — whatever it is, it shouldn't be ranking
Real calculator pages have too-low volume because tool variants steal their queries
what_would_fix_this: Noindex ALL tool variant pages — they serve no organic search purpose (users want interactive calculators, not static examples)
Fix the 20k loan blog to hide the answer from snippet scraping
Let real calculator pages (mortgage, loan, compound-interest) capture the traffic that tool variants currently waste
root_cause_analysis.estimated_impact: If tool variant noindexing reclaims ~250 impressions/month and the 20k loan blog fix converts even 2% of its 344 impressions, QFINHUB would have ~7-8 clicks/month instead of 1. This is still very low — the traffic goal remains OFF_TRACK — but it would be a meaningful improvement from the current baseline.

do_not: Do NOT edit pages during AdSense review (Phase 34 stability)
Do NOT deploy changes — Jun 25 Day 7 decision first
Do NOT prune tool variants now — Phase 31 freeze active
Do NOT use Google Indexing API
Do NOT click Validate Fix in GSC
Do NOT optimize pages with <5 impressions — statistical noise, not real rankings
next_steps: This audit is PREP ONLY. All actionable recommendations (noindex tool variants, fix 20k loan blog snippet) are BLOCKED until: (1) AdSense review completes OR Qasem approves deploy risk, (2) Phase 31 freeze lifts (earliest Jun 24), (3) Jun 25 Day 7 decision confirms holding pattern. The audit finding — 'positions 1-15 are mostly statistical noise, real volume is in tool variant cannibalization' — should inform the Day 7 decision.
